title: Job Interview
opening: Hello! Welcome. Please tell me a little about yourself.

t1.prompt: Hello! Welcome. Please tell me a little about yourself.
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! Welcome. Please tell me a little about yourself.

t2.prompt: Thank you. What kind of work experience do you have?
t2.promptTranslation: Thank you. What kind of work experience do you have?

t2b.prompt: That's interesting. And what about your work experience?
t2b.promptTranslation: That's interesting. And what about your work experience?

t3.prompt: Good. What are your strengths for this job?
t3.promptTranslation: Good. What are your strengths for this job?

t3b.prompt: Okay, thank you. What are your strengths?
t3b.promptTranslation: Okay, thank you. What are your strengths?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I did not understand. Could you please repeat that?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I did not understand. Could you please repeat that?

t-end.prompt: Thank you for your time. We will contact you soon. Goodbye!
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you for your time. We will contact you soon. Goodbye!
